messages.content: Once upon a time there lived a man far far away from any women , he was named after a legend , demterius demarcqus desmond the third , or as his friend called him triple D 3 , one day triple D 3 was on a stroll with his "boys", they were having fun and enjoying the vision of what these people call them these days as "fine shyt" , suddenly out of nowhere , piccolo pulls up , in regular piccolo fashion, he starts aura farming at the very first visual contact between the humans and the namekian, he makes sure every human present in the vicinity sees the fit, he uses KI to blow his cape, as if there is wind blowing just that there was no wind,  this enrages our triple D 3 , as he was supposed to be the coolest guy in the group , and this title was ripped from his hands , by the namekian in one swift motion , leaving him helpless, triple D 3 decides to take matters into his own hands , and challenges piccolo to a dap up match, on the condition  of , if (winner === 'triple D 3') { "one namekian has to drink McDonald's sprite"  and we all know how that ends} else if(winner === 'piccolo') { "triple D 3 has to go bald getiing rid of his waves and any hope of pulling a 'baddie' " } , who will win this match up ? will Triple D 3 be able to defend his title? join us at the dap up tournament of pride next week and find out (the dap up tournament of power was already taken)
D3- what, i have no idea how to continue this
Piccolo wins and shaves D3's head in public and everyone shames him

How does the world operate? I don't know...But I do know some *freaky* ass shit. Last night I watched an alien abduct a monkey and then surgically rewire its ass into a Bluetooth speaker. These weren't amateur probers. These were trained professionals. Certified by the **Galactic Board of Invasive Curiosity**. They shoved a George Foreman grill into that monkey's body. They called it a data port. And the monkey? The monkey ascended. You ever see a rhesus macaque achieve enlightenment mid-probe. They extracted his childhood. They pulled out a memory of a banana that was so emotionally charged that it caused a ripple in five timelines and they rated his butt hole five stars on a cosmic Yelp page called Squishy Access Points. So yeah, I don't know how the world works...but I know somewhere out there a monkey's butthole holds the secret to faster-than-light travel.

||*dies*||

Following this defeat Triple D 3 , came into his senses , he was humbled by the ungodly dap the mr. piccolo possess , so he went into dap training her piccolo, piccolo takes him to a wall and makes stare at the ants crossing by , triple D 3 was baffled but he followed the command , and he notices something.....
he notices them dapping each other up

mr. piccolo smugly defines this as the poplar hit and run dap , this dap is famous for its fast nature , it is performed when both the people are in dap up distance , but dont have time to greet each other properly so they perform the dap and keep it pushing
another variation can be seen in the following video

triple D 3 baffled by the dap knowledge mr.piccolo possess asks what is "dap up distance", mr.piccolo smugly laughs and takes him in front of a restaurant, there a man can be seen coming outside of the restaurant he sees mr. piccolo but is avoiding eye contact , then he comes near mr.piccolo and initiates the dap my saying "big dawg" , and daps piccolo up, triple D 3 didn't understand anything , he asked mr.piccolo to elaborate , mr.piccolo smugly laughs and says that's , gta barber , we will take you to him to get waves when you are ready , but he is also a veteran in dapping , he notices me in his peripheral vision but also notices that he isnt in the dap up distance yet , so he pulls out his phone to reduce eye contact , he then slowly approaches the dap up distance , then he initiates it by saying big dawg , to suppress the dap power so the earth doesn't get blown to pieces and to show respect , below is the visual representation of the exchange
(btw he is @dennis_main on youtube , and makes exactly these type of videos , it is hella funny you guys should check him out)

I woke up one morning and immediately knew something was wrong.
There was a cow dancing in the middle of my room.

Not just normal dancing either.
It was doing extremely serious ballet while humming elevator music.

I sat up in bed and said,
“Excuse me, why are you here?”

The cow stopped mid danceand said,
“Oh good, you’re awake. The refrigerator sent me.”

This made perfect sense for about three seconds.
Then my lamp started clapping.

I walked into the kitchen to investigate, but the kitchen was gone.
Instead there was a beach made entirely of mashed potatoes.

A crab wearing sunglasses waved at me and said,
“Breakfast starts in five minutes unless the ceiling explodes again.”

I asked where my house went.
The crab checked a clipboard and said,
“Probably misplaced during the Tuesday incident.”

Before I could ask what the Tuesday incident was,
a flying toaster zoomed overhead dropping slices of toast like confetti.

Then the dancing cow walked in again and whispered,
“You should probably leave before the stairs become sentient.”

At that exact moment the stairs cleared their throat.

I decided not to question it and walked outside,
only to find the entire neighborhood floating gently in the sky.

My neighbor waved from a passing hot-air balloon shaped like a shoe and shouted,
“Good morning! The moon is late again!”

I nodded politely because at this point that felt reasonable.

And that’s how my day started.
It only got slightly weirder when the mailbox tried to sell me a submarine.

Then I kindapped 5 kids for no reason.
